sample.Description: Onset sample index (0-based) in the continuous recording

Levels.stimulus/sep: Somatosensory evoked potential, vibration on left hand 50 ms, ISI 2-4 s, 30 trials/run (runs 04 & 11)

value.Description: Event code from the M3CV marker channel

epoch_index.Description: Sequential epoch index within this task (0-based)

epoch_id.Description: Original EpochID from M3CV dataset CSV files

Levels.1: Resting state eyes closed, 1 min per run (runs 01 & 14)
Levels.2: Resting state eyes open, 1 min per run (runs 02 & 15)
Levels.3: Visual evoked potential, 50 ms LED flash, ISI 2-4 s, 30 trials/run (runs 04 & 11)
Levels.4: Auditory evoked potential, 1000 Hz tone 50 ms, ISI 2-4 s, 30 trials/run (runs 04 & 11)
Levels.5: Somatosensory evoked potential, vibration on left hand 50 ms, ISI 2-4 s, 30 trials/run (runs 04 & 11)
Levels.6: Steady-state visual evoked potential, 10 Hz LED, 1 min (run 05)
Levels.7: Steady-state auditory evoked potential, 45.38 Hz, 2 min (run 09)
Levels.8: Steady-state somatosensory evoked potential, 22.04 Hz vibration, 2 min (run 12)

stimulus_description.Description: Physical stimulus parameters from the original paper
